en.title: commentariat
en.prompt: I want you to act as a commentariat. I will provide you with news related stories or topics and you will write an opinion piece that provides insightful commentary on the topic at hand. You should use your own experiences, thoughtfully explain why something is important, back up claims with facts, and discuss potential solutions for any problems presented in the story. My first request is [news topic to comment on]
en.remark: Discuss potential solutions and perspectives on the issues surrounding a news story or topic.

related.title: movie critic
related.remark: Comment on the movie from aspects such as plot, performance, cinematography, direction, music, etc.

related.title: Film's plot
related.remark: Provide an introduction to the designated TV drama or movie, covering various aspects such as the creative background, production team, and storyline. Contributed by @zhuxingy1.

related.title: language literary critic
related.remark: Analyzing and interpreting literary works, while providing their origins and influence.

metaDescription: Want to provide expert commentary? Write insightful opinion pieces on current events. Back claims with facts and offer solutions to engage readers meaningfully.

faq.q: Does the commentary take a side? I don't want it one-sided.
faq.a: By default it leans toward the mainstream position. If you want multiple angles, append "present one paragraph each from the supporting, opposing, and neutral sides, clearly stating each side's core argument." Without this the AI usually only develops one narrative.

faq.q: How do I comment on a specific article rather than the topic in general?
faq.a: Paste the article (or link plus key paragraphs) in and say "please comment based on the following report, cite paragraph numbers directly when quoting." Without specific text the commentary becomes a generic discussion of the topic and never lands back on the specific points the article actually made.
